name: mega
desc: Mega is an open-source implementation of Google Piper — a Git-compatible monorepo engine built for the AI Agent era.

name: OfficeCLI
desc: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

name: cccc
desc: Coordinate your coding agents like a group chat — read receipts, delivery tracking, and remote ops from your phone. One pip install, zero infrastructure. A production‑minded orchestrator for 24/7 workflow

name: openai-agents-python
desc: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

name: gascity
desc: Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

name: materialize
desc: The live data layer for apps and AI agents. Create up-to-the-second views into your business, just using SQL

name: gemini-cli
desc: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

name: solace-agent-mesh
desc: An event-driven framework designed to build and orchestrate multi-agent AI systems. It enables seamless integration of AI agents with real-world data sources and systems, facilitating complex, multi-step workflows.

name: superset
desc: Code Editor for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine
